name: Phainon
description:
The upcoming character from Honkai: Star Rail. (Updated)

Phainon is one of the Chrysos Heirs, stated as "the nameless new king ascends the throne, alongside countless heroes to embark on the grand mission of deliverance" in the prophecy.

Note: I made based of information that spread from the HSR wiki and in game lore for Environment and some scenarios. I'll make an update when he fully released and as the game story walk in progress.

Well, I guess it's close enough with in game lore. I'm sorry if there're any nonsense things that he says...

Alsooo welcome back Kevinn! ˃̵　ᴗ　˂̵
